_meta.comment: v1 ships 3 seeded neighborhoods (Mt Pleasant, Yaletown, Burnaby Metrotown). v1.5 expands to all 35 per spec v2 §1.4. Mirror of apps/quote/content/neighborhoods.json — keep in sync until packages/content/ extraction in v1.1.

neighborhoods.intro: Mt Pleasant is one of Vancouver's most-moved-into neighborhoods. Inlet Move Co. handles studio and one-bedroom moves between Mt Pleasant and the rest of Metro Vancouver every week. Same-week availability, hourly billing from $150/hr, $300 minimum. Quote in 60 seconds.
neighborhoods.common_moves: Most Mt Pleasant moves we run are studio and one-bedroom apartments going to Yaletown, Kitsilano, or East Van. Walk-up buildings are common; we handle the stairs without a stair fee.
neighborhoods.common_pickup_addresses_hint: Apartment buildings along Main Street, Kingsway, and Quebec Street.

neighborhoods.intro: Yaletown moves are typically condo-to-condo with elevator coordination. Inlet Move Co. handles building bookings and elevator pads as part of the standard hourly rate — no concierge fee, no elevator surcharge. Quote in 60 seconds; same-week availability.
neighborhoods.common_moves: Condo-to-condo within the downtown core, or downtown-to-suburb (North Van, Burnaby) for couples upgrading to larger spaces.
neighborhoods.common_pickup_addresses_hint: Mainland Street, Pacific Boulevard, Davie Street.

neighborhoods.intro: Metrotown moves are often 2- and 3-bedroom moves into and out of high-rise condos. Inlet Move Co. handles two-mover crews + cargo van for hourly billing from $150/hr, $300 minimum. Multigenerational moves are a specialty — we're trained for households with extended family and ceremonial items.
neighborhoods.common_moves: Condo-to-condo within Burnaby, or Metrotown-to-Surrey for families upgrading to detached homes.
neighborhoods.common_pickup_addresses_hint: Kingsway, Willingdon Avenue, Beresford Street, Imperial Street.
